rust-analyzer.terminusAutoClose.description: Whether or not to automatically close terminus panel/tab upon completion.

rust-analyzer.terminusUsePanel.description: Whether or not to spawn a panel at the bottom, or a new tab.

transform: walk(if type == "object" then with_entries(if .key == "description" then .key = "markdownDescription" else . end) else . end)
walk(if type == "object" then with_entries(if .key == "enumDescriptions" then .key = "markdownEnumDescriptions" else . end) else . end)
